# A2 Reklam
> Professional signage manufacturing in Istanbul since 2005. Design, production, installation.

## Company Info
- Location: Kagithane, Istanbul, Turkey
- Phone: +90 531 618 16 72
- Email: info@a2reklam.com
- Website: https://a2reklam.com

## What We Do
A2 Reklam manufactures and installs commercial signage across Istanbul.
Our core capabilities: illuminated signs, channel letters, totem signs, facade cladding,
vehicle wraps, wayfinding systems, stainless steel letters, and custom fabrication.

## Sectors Served
Restaurants, pharmacies, hotels, factories, shopping malls, hospitals,
schools, gas stations, gyms, law offices, barbers, car washes, and more.
